runtime.network: Iphutha lenethiwekhi. Hlola uxhumano lwakho bese uzama futhi.
runtime.server: Kwenzeke iphutha leseva. Zama futhi kamuva.
runtime.unexpected: Kwenzeke iphutha elingalindelekile. Sicela uzame futhi.

auth.weakPassword: Iphasiwedi ibuthaka kakhulu. Sebenzisa okungenani izinhlamvu ezi-6.
auth.tooManyRequests: Imizamo eminingi kakhulu. Sicela uzame futhi kamuva.
auth.userDisabled: Le akhawunti ivaliwe. Xhumana nosekelo ukuze uthole usizo.
auth.sessionExpired: Ngezizathu zokuphepha, sicela ungene ngemvume futhi bese uzama futhi.
auth.accountExistsWithDifferentCredential: I-akhawunti isivele ikhona ngale imeyili isebenzisa indlela yokungena ehlukile.
auth.credentialAlreadyInUse: Lokhu kuqinisekisa sekuvele kuxhunywe kwenye i-akhawunti.
auth.googlePlayServicesUnavailable: Izinsiza ze-Google Play azitholakali kule divayisi.
auth.googleMissingIdToken: Ukungena ngemvume kwe-Google akukwazanga ukuqedelwa. Sicela uzame futhi.
auth.appleMissingIdentityToken: Ukungena ngemvume kwe-Apple akukwazanga ukuqedelwa. Sicela uzame futhi.
auth.actionSignInFailed: Ayikwazi ukungena ngemvume njengamanje. Sicela uzame futhi.
auth.actionSignUpFailed: Ayikwazi ukudala i-akhawunti yakho njengamanje. Sicela uzame futhi.
auth.actionSocialSignInFailed: Ukungena ngemvume komphakathi akutholakali okwamanje. Sicela uzame ukungena ngemvume nge-imeyili.
auth.actionPasswordResetFailed: Ayikwazi ukuthumela isixhumanisi sokusetha kabusha okwamanje. Sicela uzame futhi.
auth.actionEmailVerificationFailed: Ayikwazi ukuthumela i-imeyili yokuqinisekisa njengamanje. Sicela uzame futhi.
auth.actionSessionRestoreFailed: Ayikwazi ukubuyisela iseshini yakho. Sicela ungene ngemvume futhi.

settings.languageChangeFailed: Ayikwazi ukushintsha ulimi njengamanje. Sicela uzame futhi.
settings.onboardingResetFailed: Ayikwazi ukuqala kabusha ukugibela khona manje. Sicela uzame futhi.
settings.profileSaveFailed: Ayikwazi ukulondoloza izilungiselelo zakho njengamanje. Sicela uzame futhi.
settings.timeout: Isicelo sithathe isikhathi eside kakhulu. Sicela uzame futhi.

permissions.photoLibraryMessage: Sicela uvule ukufinyelela ku-Photo Library kuzilungiselelo zedivayisi yakho ukuze ukhethe isithombe sephrofayela.
permissions.cameraMessage: Sicela uvule ukufinyelela kukhamera kuzilungiselelo zedivayisi yakho ukuze uthathe isithombe sephrofayela.

errors.selectFailedMessage: Asikwazanga ukubuyekeza isithombe sakho sephrofayela okwamanje. Sicela uzame futhi.
errors.captureFailedMessage: Asikwazanga ukuthwebula isithombe sakho sephrofayela okwamanje. Sicela uzame futhi.
errors.removeFailedMessage: Asikwazanga ukususa isithombe sakho sephrofayela okwamanje. Sicela uzame futhi.

language.label: Ulimi
language.restartRequiredMessage: Sicela uqale kabusha u-Ellie ukuze usebenzise izinguquko zesiqondisindlela solimi.

validation.passwordMin: Iphasiwedi kumele ibe nezinhlamvu okungenani eziyi-8

signUp.title: Dala i-akhawunti
signUp.subtitle: Qala ukulandelela amashifu akho nge-Ellie
signUp.passwordHint: Okungenani izinhlamvu eziyi-8, uhlamvu olukhulu nenombolo

forgotPassword.title: Setha kabusha iphasiwedi
forgotPassword.subtitle: Faka i-imeyili yakho sizokuthumela isixhumanisi sokusetha kabusha.

emailVerification.title: Qinisekisa i-imeyili yakho
emailVerification.subtitle: Sithumele isixhumanisi sokuqinisekisa ku-{{email}}
emailVerification.instructions: Chofoza isixhumanisi ku-imeyili ukuze uvule i-akhawunti yakho. Lesi sikrini sizovuselelwa ngokuzenzakalelayo.

paywall.title: Irosta yakho isilungile.
paywall.subtitle: Yivule ngemali encane kunekhofi.

features.askRoster: Buza okuthi "Hey __TK1__" noma yini ngohlelo lwakho
features.fullYear: Bona unyaka wakho wonke — ishifu ngayinye, inyanga nenyanga
features.offline: Isebenza ngaphansi komhlaba, asikho isignali edingekayo
features.aiPowered: Inikwa amandla yi-AI futhi ithuthuka njalo
features.fullYearFIFO: Bona unyaka wakho wonke — ibhulokhi ngayinye yomsebenzi nesikhathi ngasinye sokuphumula
features.fullYearRotating: Bona unyaka wakho wonke — isigaba ngasinye, inyanga nenyanga

paywall.noCard: Alikho ikhadi lesikweletu elidingekayo · Khansela noma nini
paywall.socialProof: Kuthenjwa ngabavukuzi abangaphansi komhlaba, ama-opharetha e-FIFO, nabasebenzi berosta ejikelezayo.

testimonials.quote: Ngibhukhe izindiza zami ngokwe-swing yami izinyanga ngaphambi kwesikhathi ngaphandle kokushayela i-HR.
testimonials.author: Sarah K., umsebenzi wemayini ongaphansi komhlaba — amashifu ajikeleza amahora ayi-12

testimonials.quote: Ngikhombise unkosikazi wami irosta yesayithi yonke ngomzuzu ongaphansi kweyodwa.
testimonials.author: Dave L., umshini wokubhola — irosta ye-FIFO

testimonials.quote: Ngibhukhe izindiza ngokwe-swing yami izinyanga ezi-3 ngaphambili ngaphandle kokushayela i-HR.
testimonials.author: Jason M., umshayeli weloli lomgodi — i-FIFO 7/7

paywall.lossAversion: Without Pro, you can only see 2 weeks of your roster.
paywall.valueFrame: Kungaphansi kwekhofi ngesonto ukuze wazi unyaka wakho wonke.
paywall.security: Inkokhelo ephephile nge-{{platform}} · Icutshungulwa yi-{{platform}}, hhayi i-Ellie
paywall.trialBadge: ISILINGO SAMAHHALA SEZINSUKU EZI-7 · AKUKHO MALI NAMUHLA
paywall.subtitle_fifo: Umjikelezo wakho we-FIFO usumakiwe. Bona wonke ama-swing nawo wonke amalanga okuphumula unyaka wonke.
paywall.subtitle_rotating: Uhlelo lwakho olujikelezayo selumakiwe. Bona wonke amashifu unyaka wonke.
paywall.billingDisclosure: Isivivinyo sakho samahhala sezinsuku ezi-7 siphela ngo-{{date}}. Khansela noma nini ku-Settings ngaphambi kwalokho ukuze ugweme izindleko. Izibhaliso zivuselelwa ngokuzenzakalela.
paywall.lossAversion_fifo: Ngaphandle kwe-Pro, izinsuku zakho ze-swing ziphinde zibe yimfihlakalo. I-R&R elandelayo ayaziwa. Bhuka isonto elingalungile, ulahlekelwe izindiza.
paywall.lossAversion_rotating: Ngaphandle kwe-Pro, irosta yakho iphinde ibe mnyama. Asikho isexwayiso sangaphambi kwesikhathi, akukho ukuhlela kusenesikhathi. Buyela ekuqageleni ebhodini lezaziso.
paywall.lossAversion_family: Ngaphandle kwe-Pro, umndeni wakho ubuye ungazi ukuthi usekhaya nini.
paywall.valueFrameMonthly: Izindleko zekhofi elilodwa ngenyanga ukuze wazi irosta yakho yonke.
paywall.valueFrameWeekly: Zama konke okuphelele ngo-{{price}}. Khansela noma nini.
paywall.billingDisclosureWeekly: Ukukhokhiswa ngo-{{price}}/iviki, njalo ngeviki. Khansela noma nini ku-Izilungiselelo.
paywall.billingDisclosureAnnualDirect: Uzokhokhiswa u-{{price}} namuhla. Kuvuselelwa minyaka yonke. Khansela noma nini ku-Izilungiselelo.
paywall.billingDisclosureMonthlyDirect: Uzokhokhiswa u-{{price}} namuhla. Kuvuselelwa nyanga zonke. Khansela noma nini ku-Izilungiselelo.
paywall.restorePurchasesNotFound: Akukho ukuthenga kwangaphambilini okutholakele kule akhawunti.

profile.upgradeHint: Isivivinyo samahhala sezinsuku ezingu-7 · $6.99/mo noma $49.99 ngonyaka

padlock.a11yLabel: Thuthukela ku-__TK1__ Pro ukuze ubone ikhalenda eligcwele

recoveryNudge.title: Usekufinyeleleni okulinganiselwe
recoveryNudge.body: Vula unyaka wakho wonke — wonke amashifu, wonke ama-swing, kuhlelwe kusenesikhathi.

featureGate.title: I-Pro ivula unyaka wakho wonke
featureGate.body: Bona inyanga ngayinye kusenesikhathi — akukho zimanga, akukho ukuqagela i-R&R yakho elandelayo.
